description_long: This is a pair of low-top canvas sneakers featuring a vibrant green and yellow pattern with circular motifs, reminiscent of a playful, urban streetwear style. The shoes have yellow laces threaded through metal eyelets and a classic white rubber toe cap, typical of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star sneakers. The midsole is white with a black stripe running along its length, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. Branding details are visible on the tongue and heel, with the iconic Converse All Star patch on the heel tab. The shoes are clean and show no visible signs of wear, suggesting they are in new or like-new condition. The overall construction combines canvas, rubber, and textile materials, making them lightweight and flexible for everyday urban use.
description: A pair of low-top canvas sneakers with a green and yellow circular pattern, yellow laces, and classic white rubber toe caps and midsoles. Branding is visible on the tongue and heel, and the shoes appear new and unworn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow laces, white rubber toe caps, and the patterned canvas uppers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green and yellow circular pattern, black midsole stripe, and the low-top silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel branding, white midsoles, and the back of the patterned canvas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the Converse All Star patch on the heel and the full side pattern.
attribute_logo: Rectangular Converse All Star patch on the heel tab, white with black text; circular Converse All Star logo on the inner side of the shoe.
